channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A dead fox in my garden I have put in a bag, 12th July
item.description:
Dead fox
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned stripped bikes x2, 12th July
item.description:
Abandoned +1 year. Reported previously. Rusty, only frames remaining -- parts all removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Fitzroy Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime bike left in street, 12th July
item.description:
Blocking roadway and obstruction bus route / stop - one Lime bike Repeat offender

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Canfield Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 12th July
item.description:
Mattress has been dumped on pavement just before the parking area for Byron House
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chapel Close, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 12th July
item.description:
This rubbish has been dumped and is attracting insects and vermin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wrotham Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concrete fence coming out of the post, 12th July
item.description:
Tree has pushed the concrete fence panels out of the post

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rydal Drive, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent! ‼️, 12th July
item.description:
Please sweep and take it away! Spread it on the road last night by foxes! Urgent action need it !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glengall Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazards, 12th July
item.description:
Trip hazards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Round Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged vehicle, possibly abandoned, 12th July
item.description:
A red car is on the grass. The front passenger side has damage to the front wheel, windscreen and bumper, and it looks as though the driver's window has been smashed in. I don't know how long it has been there for. I saw it at around 8.50am on Sunday 12th July.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orpington Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting, 12th July
item.description:
Lighting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyatt Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins overflowing and rubbish left outside bins, 12th July
item.description:
Rubbish in the park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Denton Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More endangerment for cyclists, 12th July
item.description:
Parking whenever and wherever they like.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grey Hyundai WV60 GUU dumped in Goodmead Road, 12th July
item.description:
A grey Hyundai registration WV60 GUU has been dumped on the right hand side of Goodmead Road just before you come to Glendower Crescent. It has a missing front headlight.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goodmead Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed car with smashed windows, 12th July
item.description:
Untaxed car parked on street for months. Smashed windows clearly abandoned. Multiple untaxed vehicles parked on the street from house that is being used for mechanic business purposes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Hodson Crescent, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 12th July
item.description:
Hi, something left a sofa outside this building and it has seemingly encouraged others to tip their own rubbish too, including a fridge and air-con unit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blatant disregard for cyclists, 12th July
item.description:
Every weekend cars parked wherever they like. On the crossing, on the pavement, double yellows and the cycle lane. Never seen a single vehicle ticketed or towed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A bin with an awful smell, 12th July
item.description:
A bin crawling with maggots with an awful smell when you walk past

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Oaks Avenue, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking cones at SE20 8ax, 12th July
item.description:
Thank you for your quick response to my previous report. Your team was very efficient and removed the cones quickly. Unfortunately, the residents have put the cones back on the street. They are blocking the public parking spaces again. This is an ongoing issue. Could you please investigate this matter further? Permanent action is needed to stop this regular obstruction. Thank you for your help
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Versailles Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken swing in children’s playground, 12th July
item.description:
Swing missing two nuts at chain connection to swing seat in children’s playground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wentworth Crescent, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple dumped Lime bikes, 12th July
item.description:
Large number of Lime bikes probably left by residents of nearby flats - blocking path near bus stop. If cycle lane was busy this could be dangerous too. These bikes need proper docking stations and people should be fined for parking across pavements.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 445, Woolwich Road, Charlton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
